statements.__comment: Link Package to ontology Image via TrivyPackage DEPLOYED
statements.query: MATCH (p:Package)-[:DETECTED_AS]->(tp:TrivyPackage)-[:DEPLOYED]->(img:Image) MERGE (p)-[r:DEPLOYED]->(img) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Link Package to ontology Image via SyftPackage DEPLOYED
statements.query: MATCH (p:Package)-[:DETECTED_AS]->(sp:SyftPackage)-[:DEPLOYED]->(img:Image) MERGE (p)-[r:DEPLOYED]->(img) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Link TrivyImageFinding AFFECTS to canonical Package via TrivyPackage
statements.query: MATCH (f:TrivyImageFinding)-[:AFFECTS]->(tp:TrivyPackage)<-[:DETECTED_AS]-(p:Package) MERGE (f)-[r:AFFECTS]->(p) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: DEPRECATED: Link Package SHOULD_UPDATE_TO TrivyFix via TrivyPackage for compatibility
statements.query: MATCH (p:Package)-[:DETECTED_AS]->(tp:TrivyPackage)-[:SHOULD_UPDATE_TO]->(fix:TrivyFix) MERGE (p)-[r:SHOULD_UPDATE_TO]->(fix) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Link Package DEPENDS_ON Package via SyftPackage dependency graph
statements.query: MATCH (p1:Package)-[:DETECTED_AS]->(sp1:SyftPackage)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(sp2:SyftPackage)<-[:DETECTED_AS]-(p2:Package) MERGE (p1)-[r:DEPENDS_ON]->(p2) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
